analysis.core_story_summary: Parvati continuing with her statements said that Shiva was the most capable deity in all the three world. "There is no sin greater than condemning Shiva. " Said Parvati.

audience_notes.children_8_12: Use simple language, explain divine names as characters in a sacred legend.
